LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS OSHRI MALKA, AND PROSPER CONSTRUCTION DEVELOPMENT, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER, WHICH IS LIMITED TO THE COMPLAINT'S THIRD COUNT (INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION), IS OVERRULED. COUNT 3 IS ADEQUATELY ALLEGED FOR THE PLEADING STAGE. (SEE, E.G., CMPLT. 6:8-16, 7:3-9, 12:7-13:12.) ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Continued To Feb-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS OSHRI MALKA, AND PROSPER CONSTRUCTION DEVELOPMENT, INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendants' demurrer, which is limited to the complaint's third count (intentional misrepresentation), is overruled. Count 3 is adequately alleged for the pleading stage. (See, e.g., Cmplt. 6:8-16, 7:3-9, 12:7-13:12.)

order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS OSHRI MALKA, PROSPER CONSTRUCTION DEVELOPMENT, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Defendants' motion to strike is denied. The complaint adequately alleges fraud for the pleading stage. (Id. at 6:8-16, 7:3-9, 12:7-13:12.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
